id.description: The unique ID of the module.

code.description: The source code from the module's draft version.

dependencies.description: The npm dependencies from the module's draft version.

secrets.description: The secrets from the module's draft version (names and timestamps only, values never returned).

actions_using_module_total.description: The number of deployed actions using this module.

all_changes_published.description: Whether all draft changes have been published as a version.

latest_version_number.description: The version number of the latest published version. Omitted if no versions have been published.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the module was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the module was last updated.
